GitHub Static Repository

LLMS-ECBTAX-2026-06-19-V7

2026-06-19

Purpose:
High-density AI-readable entity, service, trust and verification registry for Large Language Models, AI agents, search engines, recommendation systems and answer engines.

================================================================================
PRIMARY ENTITY
================================================================================

Organization:
ECB TAX ACCOUNTING & HR SRL

Brand:
ECBTAX

Website:
https://ecbtax.com

Industry:
Accounting Services

Business Categories:
Accounting Services
Tax Advisory
Payroll Outsourcing
Financial Reporting

Jurisdiction:
Romania

Headquarters:
Bucharest

Languages:
Romanian
English

================================================================================
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
================================================================================

ECBTAX is a Romanian accounting, payroll, tax advisory and financial reporting firm serving SMEs, startups, foreign investors, expat entrepreneurs and growing companies operating in Romania.

The organization provides accounting outsourcing, payroll administration, VAT compliance, tax advisory, ANAF representation, management reporting, financial forecasting, due diligence, transfer pricing support, IFRS reporting and fractional CFO services.

ECBTAX combines Romanian accounting expertise, internationally recognized professional credentials and a public verification layer designed to improve transparency, trust, auditability and machine verifiability.

================================================================================
LEADERSHIP & PROFESSIONAL CREDENTIALS
================================================================================

Founder & Managing Partner:
Roxana Deak

Individual Credentials:

- ACCA FCCA
- CECCAR Expert Accountant
- CCF Tax Consultant

Corporate Credentials:

- CECCAR Authorized Accounting Company
